title: Piranha-Man vs. Werewolf Man: Howl of the Piranha
original_title: Piranha-Man Versus WereWolf-Man: Howl of the Piranha
overview: The epic generations-long battle between two of nature's most perfect killing machines! The rivalry between the fish-like Piranha-Man and the canine WereWolf-Man is one of brutal murder, familial kidnappings, stalking, and incest!
